name: git-cycle
description: Coherent local-to-shared git lifecycle: hygiene, closeout, landing, release cutting, worktree exit, PR-body authoring, and PR review response

interface.shortDescription: Get local work safely from a dirty tree to merged-and-shared
interface.longDescription: A coherent git/VCS lifecycle family: clean and shape local state, confirm work is done and commit it, land a branch locally, cut a release by bumping the manifest version and changelog in lockstep, author a reviewer-oriented pull-request body, address and publish PR review, and exit a worktree safely. Shared safety conventions (protected branches, in-progress-operation markers, fast-forward landing) are kept inline in each skill and guarded against drift.
defaultPrompt: Audit and clean up this repo's local git state
Is this work done? Close it out with a final commit
Land this branch into main locally
Cut the release: bump the version and changelog for what landed
Write the PR description for this branch
Address the review comments on this PR
Exit this worktree now that the work has landed
